title: Better Enchanted Tool Textures
description: A resource pack that gives each enchantment its own unique texture overlay on tools and weapons. Supports Fire Aspect, Sharpness, Mending, Silk Touch, Fortune, and Flame across all tool types and tiers. Requires 1.21.5 or newer, no mods needed.
body:
# Better Enchanted Tool Textures

B.E.T.T is a resource pack that replaces the default enchantment glint with distinct, per-enchantment texture overlays. Each enchantment gets its own visual, making it easy to identify what's on your tools without opening a tooltip.

## Supported Enchantments

![grid image of all textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52822f1b3b658203ac7a681f5c68e2f3c5c4fb39.png)

| Enchantment | Swords | Axes | Pickaxes | Shovels | Hoes | Bows | Crossbows | Maces | Spears |
|-------------|-------|------|----------|---------|------|------|-----------|-------|--------|
| Fire Aspect / Flame | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| Sharpness | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| Mending | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | Yes |
| Silk Touch | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Fortune | No | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| Multishot | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes | No | No |
| Firework Rocket | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes | No | No |
| Wind Burst | No | No | No | No | No | No | No | Yes | No |

- Animated textures for Fire Aspect, Flame, Sharpness, and Wind Burst
- Material-specific fire overlays for Copper and Netherite variants
- Dynamic Lights compatibility (MrExpence's Dynamic Lights) for Fire Aspect swords and Flame bows
- All tool tiers covered: Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite, and Copper

## How It Works

B.E.T.T uses Minecraft's data-driven item model system introduced in 1.21.5 to conditionally swap textures based on enchantments. Multiple enchantment overlays can stack on the same tool. No mods required.

## Requirements

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5 or newer
- No mods required (optional: MrExpence's Dynamic Lights for glow effects)
